channel.title: OpenWorm on bluee :)
channel.description: Recent content in OpenWorm on bluee :)

item.title: GSoC Midterm: Everything I've Built So Far
item.description: A walk through the work done till the midterm evaluation from raw C. elegans microscopy to a trained ESTGEL model, attention maps, and an interactive embryo dashboard.

item.title: GSOC Week 4: Training the ESTGEL Pipeline
item.description: Connected the data, model, loss, and checkpointing into a working training flow.

item.title: GSOC Week 3: ESTGEL Explained with a Social Network Analogy
item.description: A plain-English breakdown of ESTGEL’s three modules using a student friendship network analogy.

item.title: Tiny Worms and Large Graphs
item.description: So, I Started Working on OpenWorm
